Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Feb-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. G. RYAN PATRICK, Esq. of Wiegel Law Group, PLC (Tel: 415-552-8230) for plaintiff John Yee;
Atty. DEREK W. CHANTLER, Esq. of Chantler Law Offices (Tel: 650-387-5328) for specially appearing defendants Khaldoun Ramadan, Wafa Erakat, Khaled Ramadan & Sunrise Middle Eastern Deli, Inc.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS KHALDOUN RAMADAN, KHALED RAMADAN, WAFA ERAKAT, AND SUNRISE MIDDLE EASTERN DELI, INC.'s Motion To Quash Service Of Summons.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification as follows: Khaldoun Ramadan, Khaled Ramadan, Wafa Erakat and Sunrise Middle Eastern Deli, Inc.'s unopposed motion to quash service of summons is granted as to the November 9, 2020 service date.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
